children.heading: Increased Assistance for Members With Critical Skills or Specialty.—
children.label: a Increased Assistance for Members With Critical Skills or Specialty.—

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: In the case of an individual who has a skill or specialty designated by the Secretary concerned as a skill or specialty in which there is a critical shortage of personnel or for which it is difficult to recruit or, in the case of critical units, retain personnel, the Secretary concerned may increase the monthly amount of educational assistance otherwise payable to the individual under paragraph (1)(B) of section 3313(c), or under paragraphs (2) through (6) of such section (as applicable).

children.heading: .—Maximum amount of increase in assistance
children.label: 2 .—Maximum amount of increase in assistance
children.text: The amount of the increase in educational assistance authorized by paragraph (1) may not exceed the amount equal to the monthly amount of increased basic educational assistance providable under section 3015(d)(1) at the time of the increase under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Supplemental Assistance for Additional Service.—
children.label: b Supplemental Assistance for Additional Service.—

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The Secretary concerned may provide for the payment to an individual entitled to educational assistance under this chapter of supplemental educational assistance for additional service authorized by subchapter III of chapter 30. The amount so payable shall be payable as an increase in the monthly amount of educational assistance otherwise payable to the individual under paragraph (1)(B) of section 3313(c), or under paragraphs (2) through (6) of such section (as applicable).

children.heading: .—Eligibility
children.label: 2 .—Eligibility
children.text: Eligibility for supplemental educational assistance under this subsection shall be determined in accordance with the provisions of subchapter III of chapter 30, except that any reference in such provisions to eligibility for basic educational assistance under a provision of subchapter II of chapter 30 shall be treated as a reference to eligibility for educational assistance under the appropriate provision of this chapter.

children.heading: .—Amount
children.label: 3 .—Amount
children.text: The amount of supplemental educational assistance payable under this subsection shall be the amount equal to the monthly amount of supplemental educational assistance payable under section 3022.

children.heading: Continuation of Increased Educational Assistance.—
children.label: c Continuation of Increased Educational Assistance.—

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: An individual who made an election to receive educational assistance under this chapter pursuant to section 5003(c)(1)(A) of the Post-9/11 Veterans Educational Assistance Act of 2008 ( note) and who, at the time of the election, was entitled to increased educational assistance under section 3015(d) or shall remain entitled to increased educational assistance in the utilization of the individual’s entitlement to educational assistance under this chapter.38 U.S.C. 3301section 16131(i) of title 10

children.label: A
children.text: the rate of educational assistance otherwise payable to the individual under section 3015(d) or , as the case may be, had the individual not made the election described in paragraph (1), multiplied bysection 16131(i) of title 10

children.label: ii
children.text: the number of course hours borne by the individual in pursuit of the program of education involved divided by the minimum number of course hours required for full-time pursuit of the program of education, rounded to the nearest multiple of 10.

children.heading: .—Frequency of payment
children.label: 3 .—Frequency of payment
children.text: Payment of the amounts payable under paragraph (1) during pursuit of a program of education shall be made on a monthly basis.

children.heading: .—Funding
children.label: d .—Funding
children.text: Payments for increased educational assistance under this section shall be made from the Department of Defense Education Benefits Fund under or from appropriations available to the Department of Homeland Security for that purpose, as applicable.section 2006 of title 10

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: e .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretaries concerned shall administer this section in accordance with such regulations as the Secretary of Defense shall prescribe.
